Government Recognised

Govt & NASSCOM Certifications

UNLOX is officially backed by India's apex IT body and recognised as a DPIIT Startup India company — giving your certificate real national credibility.

🏅 NASSCOM FutureSkills Prime — Gold Certificate

Issued by Ministry of Electronics & IT, Govt of India · Aligned to IT-ITeS Sector Skills Council standards · Gold Category: 70%+ score
